title: Copywriting Pack
description: Persuasive writing for ads, pages and email.

entries.content: The first line does 80% of the work. Use curiosity, a bold claim, a relatable pain, or a pattern interrupt. If the hook fails, nothing else is read.
Problem — agitate the pain — solution. Name the reader's problem precisely, twist the knife on the consequences, then present your product as the relief.
Sell the outcome. 'Non-slip base' → 'stays put so it never spills on your counter'. Every feature should answer 'so what does that do for me?'
Specific beats vague: numbers, timeframes, concrete images. Short sentences. One idea per line. Read it aloud — if you stumble, rewrite.
